title: Tamizhanda Song Lyrics Kolanji
stanzas:
Ulagathin mudhal inam naanga
manithathin maru peyar naanga
kal thondri man thondraa
antha kaalathil piranthavan naanga

em marabil jaathigal illai
em kulathil vedhangal illai
samathuvathin pillaigal naanga
thala nimirndhe nadappondaa

pirappukum ellaa uyirkkum

yaadhum oorey yaavarum kaelir
sonnavan tamizhanthaan

kalvi selvam kondu
vazhnthavan tamizhanthaan
ellai ivanukku illai
ulagam mattumthaan

seo.title: Tamizhanda Song Lyrics Kolanji

seo.keywords: Naveen M, Kolanji, Natarajan Sankaran, Deepak, Tamizhanda full lyrics, Kolanji songs lyrics, Tamizhanda lyrics snippets, Tamizhanda WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Tamizhanda lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Tamizhanda'?

'Tamizhanda' conveys a message of Tamil pride and unity, celebrating the essence of Tamil identity.

What is the plot context of the movie Kolanji?

The movie Kolanji explores themes of family, culture, and the struggles of rural life, with the song reflecting its core values.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Deepak and composed by Natarajan Sankaran.

When was 'Tamizhanda' released?

'Tamizhanda' was released on January 24, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Tamizhanda, the song encapsulates the essence of Tamil culture and pride, resonating with themes of unity and motivation. It serves as a powerful anthem within the narrative of Kolanji, where characters embody the spirit of their heritage. The energetic beats and inspiring lyrics evoke a sense of belonging and celebration. This song not only entertains but also instills a deep sense of pride in Tamil identity.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Tamizhanda from Kolanji is an electrifying anthem that celebrates Tamil pride and unity. With Deepak's powerful vocals and Natarajan Sankaran's vibrant composition, this song resonates with a spirit of motivation and energy. Dive into the rhythm and let the essence of Tamil culture uplift your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: We are the first identity of the world, we are the other name of humanity. We are those who were born in that time.
In our memory, there are no castes; in our lineage, there are no divisions. We are the children of equality, standing tall and walking forward.
We will express our feelings for the sake of love, and we will work only for that.
For every birth and every life, he said he is a Tamizhian. He said that every place is his, and everyone is a Tamizhian.
The one who lives with education and wealth is a Tamizhian; otherwise, he has nothing, only the world.
Others may create divisions, but we will break those barriers.
Tamizh songs are the essence of our culture and our native language.
We will express our feelings for the sake of love, and we will work only for that.
Tamizhanda, green Tamizhanda. Tamizhanda, green Tamizhanda.
We are the first identity of the world, we are the other name of humanity. We are those who were born in that time.
In our memory, there are no castes; in our lineage, there are no divisions. We are the children of equality, standing tall and walking forward.
